extract: Not to be confused with Poltergeist. Polteageist (Japanese: ポットデス Potdeath) is a Ghost-type Pokémon introduced in Generation VIII. It evolves from Sinistea when exposed to a Cracked Pot or a Chipped Pot, depending on Sinistea's form. Polteageist's form will be the same as it was as a Sinistea. The Phony Form (which lacks a stamp of authenticity) requires a Cracked Pot to evolve. The Antique Form (which has a stamp of authenticity) requires a Chipped Pot to evolve. It bears a close resemblance to Sinistcha; however, the two are separate species.
